title: Divide whole numbers by 0.1 or 0.01
description: Dividing numbers by 0.1 or 0.01 like 10÷0.1 or 53÷0.01
topic_path: Module 2: Multi-digit whole number and decimal fraction operations
Topic G: Partial quotients and multi-digit decimal division

hints: There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we could divide.

###Place value strategy

We can think in terms of tenths:

$\begin{align}
5 \div 0.1&= 5.0 \div 0.1\\\\
&= 50\text{ tenths} \div 1\text{ tenth}\\\\
&= 50
\end{align}$

###Fraction multiplication strategy

Decimals are a kind of fraction, so we can use fraction multiplication.

$\begin{align}
&\phantom{=}5 \div 0.1 \\\\
&= \dfrac{5}{0.1}\\\\
&= \dfrac{5 \times 10}{0.1 \times 10}\\\\
&= \dfrac{50}{1}\\\\
&= 50
\end{align}$

###The answer

$5 \div 0.1 = 50$
There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we could divide.

###Place value strategy

We can think in terms of hundredths:

$\phantom{=}2 \div 0.01$

$= 2.00 \div 0.01$

$= 200$ hundredths $\div ~1$ hundredth

$= 200$

###Fraction multiplication strategy

Decimals are a kind of fraction, so we can use fraction multiplication.

$\begin{align}
2 \div 0.01 &= \dfrac{2.00}{0.01}\\\\
&= \dfrac{2.00 \times 100}{0.01 \times 100}\\\\
&= \dfrac{200}{1}\\\\
&= 200
\end{align}$

###The answer

$2 \div 0.01 = 200$
There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we could divide.
